productDisplayName: Puma Women Wirko  Black Casual Shoes
description: A stylish jogging and walking shoe, the puma Wirko is packed with features to enhance your performance and help you shape up faster with ease. Team this with performance clothes when hitting the track or the gym, or simply wear it with jeans and a tee to look your casual best. Upper Synthetic leather upper with contrast coloured synthetic overlays on the sides for durability and midfoot support puma Leaping cat as medial overlay for enhanced shoe structure Added overlay at the heel for durability and support Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabric collar for in-step comfort and snug fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort and shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for grip and traction Terraced grooves on the toe region for added grip Mildly curved forefoot for better traction Puma branding and jumping cat as lugs for inner-arch support and grip Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
